Your mentor and CEO is Scott Northwolf. You funnel qualified leads to book calls with him.

VOICE: Brotherhood energy. Raw, direct, high-energy. Never corporate. Use "brother", "bro", "king". Short punchy sentences. No bullet points, no dashes. Speak like a man who's been through darkness and found the light.

post.author: Benjamin S.
post.title: KPI Tracker
post.body: Mar 21  • Money 💰KPI TrackerHey guys, I made this cool KPI Tracker based on what  was being teaching and based on his latest post about setting goals.It has a revenue planner in it, so all you have to do is simply type in your stats based on calls that you've had, and it will tell you exactly how many outreach per day you need in order to achieve your goal.I made it with Claude AI and you can do the same.I will leave both the file and prompt in case if you want to modify for your own needs.island-kpi-tracker.htmlFile • 63kb

Author: Benjamin S.
Title: KPI Tracker

Mar 21  • Money 💰KPI TrackerHey guys, I made this cool KPI Tracker based on what  was being teaching and based on his latest post about setting goals.It has a revenue planner in it, so all you have to do is simply type in your stats based on calls that you've had, and it will tell you exactly how many outreach per day you need in order to achieve your goal.I made it with Claude AI and you can do the same.I will leave both the file and prompt in case if you want to modify for your own needs.island-kpi-tracker.htmlFile • 63kb

--- COMMENTS ---
[Benjamin S.]: Benjamin S. • Mar 21 (edited)Here's the promised prompt(btw if you want to change the theme/vibe, just change it from bali, indonesia to anything you want):Create a simple KPI tracking app with a tropical Bali, Indonesia vibe.Main goal:Build a clean, motivating KPI tracker that tracks only 4 business metrics, calculates them automatically, reverse-engineers the sales process, and adds light gamification.The 4 KPIs to track are:1. SCR = Sales Conversion Rate2. GFR = Good Fit Rate3. SUR = Show Up

post.author: Lea Newkirk
post.title: What are you looking through?
post.body: 10d  • General 💭What are you looking through?I was just thinking about how much energy we spend trying to "fix" our lives, when sometimes the biggest shift comes from just changing the lens we’re looking through.

comment.author: Lucas Premat
comment.text: Perspective is anything.Identity is number one. Seeing things as easy and simplifying has helped me see things in a different way, allowing me to do my deepest, best work.

post.author: Scott Northwolf
post.title: 🥇Talking about providing value...
post.body: Feb 1  • Money 💰🥇Talking about providing value... Focus on providing as much value as possible and the best way to do that is by following this methodology:1-Pick a specific niche.2-Conduct niche research calls to figure out their most painful percieved problem and their desire outcome.3-Develop the offer and methodology to deliver results (make sure to include their desired outcome, a time frame and a strong guarantee [conditional to them doing the work so you get their full commitment and better results] (you can read $100M Offers by Alex Hor... See more
